name: Baked Orange Roughy with Cheese & Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 4 Slices cheese, cut into half-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a shallow 2-quart baking dish with margarine.
3. Scatter scallions and mushrooms evenly over the bottom of the dish.
4. Place fillets in a single layer on top, spacing them apart.
5. Mix white wine and lemon juice together and pour over the fish.
6. Sprinkle marjoram and black pepper over the fillets.
7. Distribute cheese strips evenly over the fillets.
8. Crumple waxed paper into a loose layer and place it loosely over the fish.
9. Bake for about 7 minutes.
10. Remove fish from oven, discard waxed paper.
11. Sprinkle fish with bread crumbs.
12. Return to oven and bake another 7-9 minutes or until fish is cooked through.
13. Remove fish from oven and broil on high for 1 minute to brown the top of the fillets.
Substitiue: Cod, haddock, catfish, ocean perch or rockfish.
